seo.title: HVAC Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your HVAC business. Route unhappy customers to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for HVAC Repair
hero.subheading: Emergency calls and seasonal rushes leave little time to follow up. ReviewFlo sends the ask by text or email so you do not rely on memory.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every HVAC Business Faces

items.heading: Happy jobs end with a paid invoice, not a review
items.body: Customers move on with their day. Google never hears about the great service.

items.heading: One botched install review can tank local trust
items.body: Searchers skim stars first. A harsh headline stops the phone from ringing.

items.heading: Crews are in attics and crawl spaces, not marketing meetings
items.body: There is no one whose job is to chase reviews after every ticket.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for HVAC Companies

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Works after the job is done
items.body: Send the link when the work is complete and the house is cooling again.

items.heading: Private channel for angry customers
items.body: Cooling off happens in your inbox first, not on your public profile.

items.heading: Same flow for service and installs
items.body: One link for your whole team, whether it was a quick repair or a full replacement.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Will customers leave reviews for HVAC work?
items.a: Yes, when the ask is easy and arrives right after a comfortable home again.

items.q: What if someone is upset about a bill?
items.a: They can rate low and message you privately so you can explain or adjust before it goes public.

items.q: Can my techs send the link from the truck?
items.a: Yes. Text or email works from any phone. No special app required for the basics.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same review routing idea at a price built for small shops, not enterprise rollouts.
Yes. Scale up on the plan that fits as you add crews.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More HVAC Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
